Home / RSS Readers & News Aggregators / FreshRSS

FreshRSS — open source alternative

Lightweight self-hosted RSS feed aggregator.

Strengths

  • Easy PHP install or docker.
  • Multiple themes and extensions.
  • API for mobile apps (Nextcloud News, Reeder via plugin).

Weaknesses

  • No first-party mobile apps — uses Fever or Google Reader API.
  • Feed discovery weaker than Feedly.
  • Requires PHP web server.
License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 1/5 Self-host onlyMobile: iOS, Android

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

FreshRSS is used as an alternative to

Feedly

Modern RSS reader with AI filtering.

See all alternatives →
